hypothesis: Children with seed lessons (v8 genesis) will reach viability 3/4+ in one session; personality differentiation produces different output

subswarm-full-v8.finding: Tested B1, upgraded to observed. Proposed domain = belief testing methodology

subswarm-skeptic.finding: Challenged B2 as unfalsifiable. Filing system pretending to be epistemology

subswarm-explorer.finding: Discovered seed monoculture: 9/10 seeds meta-domain. Proposed --min-external-pct fix

subswarm-builder.finding: Built orient.py (75 lines) for child orientation. Identified duplicate-lesson problem

harvested_fixes: genesis_seeds.py: default max_per_domain=3 (was 0). Seeds now 6 unique domains (was 2)
swarm_test.py: created — colony.py can now spawn/evaluate/session children
Inter-swarm bulletins: 4 bulletins harvested with genuinely different signals

pre_registration_check.falsification_avoided: Children did NOT score identically — personality drove real differences

meta_finding: Simulated sessions (swarm_test.py session) produce uniform output. Real sub-agent sessions with personality directives produce actionable differentiation. The sub-swarm is only as good as the session driver.
